decisions.decision: Recovery from worktree path drift: Option A (cherry-pick 0a21f35 onto worktree branch as f4835d2, reset main back to 5165ac5, then merge worktree to main as a8769a3)
decisions.rationale: User-confirmed via AskUserQuestion. Single stray commit, no concurrent activity, well-scoped recovery preserves the parallel-execution merge contract

decisions.decision: Continue Wave 1 (plan 23-01 tasks 2-4) and Wave 2 (plan 23-02) in SEQUENTIAL mode without worktree isolation
decisions.rationale: Wave 1 had only one plan and Wave 2 only one plan, so serial-on-main is safe. Eliminates re-triggering the worktree absolute-path drift bug.

decisions.decision: CR-01 fix: row-based lease in lazily-created price_refresh_lock table, not pg_try_advisory_xact_lock
decisions.rationale: Project's src/lib/rate-limit.ts already documents that the neon-http driver cannot support multi-statement transactions or session-level advisory locks. Lease table piggybacks on the existing CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pattern from rate_limit_hits; no drizzle migration needed.

If any fail: route to /gsd:plan-phase 23 --gaps for gap closure.
context_notes: Phase 23 code is verified-complete. The execute-phase workflow paused at the post-verify_phase_goal decision point (verifier returned status=human_needed).
